summary: Web application with prominent speaker logo, branded slogan, and audio upload system featuring favorites and audio replies for logged-in members, with upload persistence and admin management capabilities. Includes a kid-friendly section with content filtering, simplified authentication (username + PIN), and playful styling accessible via navigation toggle.
architectural_notes: Audio uploads exist in general feed and category-specific views
Audio reply system creates independent uploads with linkage to original audio
Favorite and reply features require user authentication
Upload persistence layer protects content during site updates and alterations
Admin role with elevated permissions limited to site owner
Deletion permissions restricted to uploader or admin only
Content rating system tags uploads as 'Kid-Friendly' or 'Adult Content' via toggle
Kids section uses username + PIN authentication instead of email/Internet Identity
Kids mode filters all views (feed, explore, dashboard) to show only kid-friendly content
Kids section maintains full feature parity with main site (favorites, replies, categories)
known_issues: Version 44 deployment causing site to be stuck on 'going live' loading message/spinner on mobile devices, preventing site from loading entirely

existing_features.title: Move the BrandingBannerDropdown component (containing About and Privacy Policy links) to be positioned next to the logo in the top left area of the header
Reposition the login button (currently on the right side) to be directly underneath the dropdown menu in the top left area
Add small spacing between the dropdown menu and login button to ensure easy touch/click targets
Reduce the vertical padding and spacing around all header elements in the Header component to create a more compact top section
Decrease the vertical spacing between the logo, BrandingBannerDropdown menu, and login button that are stacked in the top left area
Move the slogan text closer to the header content to reduce the overall header height and create a more compact top section
Add a favorite button with heart icon to each audio upload card in the feed and dashboard, visible and functional only for logged-in members
Add an audio reply button to each audio upload card that opens the audio recording interface for logged-in members to record a response
Add an 'Audio Replies' section below each audio card that displays all linked audio replies as a list of playable audio cards
Update the AudioCard component to include favorite and reply buttons with proper authentication checks and integrate with backend services

Fix the error that occurs when clicking the reply button to post an audio reply after recording has completed successfully. Ensure the reply is properly submitted to the backend with the correct replyTo reference linking it to the original post.
Add proper error handling and user feedback in the AudioReplyDialog component to display specific error messages when reply submission fails, including backend validation errors and network issues.
Remove the stationary upload button that is positioned to the right of the logo in the header (underneath the floating buttons)
Reduce the vertical spacing between the logo and slogan to make them appear more compact and closely grouped together
Increase the vertical spacing below the slogan to create clear separation between the slogan and the search bar underneath it
Further reduce the overall vertical padding around all header elements in the Header component to create an even more compact header section
Further decrease the vertical spacing between the logo and slogan beyond the current implementation to group them even more closely together
Ensure adequate vertical spacing remains between the slogan and the search bar below it to maintain clear visual separation
Replace the current logo in the Header component with the user's uploaded speaker logo image (file_000000008744720abc6dc9f1fb80f8e2-7.png) as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated
Position the slogan text below the header separator line (not overlapping it) while maintaining close proximity to the logo above

Replace the current logo in the Header component with the new cropped speaker logo image (file_000000008744720abc6dc9f1fb80f8e2-8.png) as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated, maintaining the current logo size and positioning that was previously approved

Add a 'Kid-Friendly' toggle field to the audio upload interface in the UploadForm component that allows users to mark their audio content as either 'Kid-Friendly' or 'Adult Content' during the upload process
Create a 'KIDS' navigation button in the PrimaryNav component positioned next to the existing FEED, EXPLORE, and UPLOAD buttons that toggles kids mode when clicked

Implement a global kids mode state in a Zustand store that controls whether the application displays in kids mode or regular mode, affecting content filtering and visual styling throughout the application
Update the FeedPage component to filter and display only kid-friendly audio posts when kids mode is active, using the backend query function that returns kidFriendly content
Update the ExplorePage component to filter and display only kid-friendly content in category cards when kids mode is active
Update the DashboardPage component to filter and display only kid-friendly uploads in the MyContentSection and FavoritesSection when kids mode is active
Apply kid-friendly visual styling to the entire application when kids mode is active, including colorful and playful colors, rounded shapes, larger interactive elements, and fun typography
Enforce a 1-hour maximum upload duration limit in kids mode for all audio recordings and file uploads
Update the UploadForm component to respect kids mode state: enforce 1-hour limit, ensure kid-friendly toggle defaults to 'Kid-Friendly' in kids mode, and apply kid-friendly styling
Update AudioRepliesSection and AudioReplyDialog components to filter replies to show only kid-friendly replies when kids mode is active

Investigate and fix the deployment issue in Version 44 that causes the site to display a 'going live' loading message/spinner indefinitely on mobile devices, preventing the application from loading or initializing properly

Add comprehensive error handling and logging to the frontend initialization process in frontend/src/main.tsx and frontend/src/App.tsx to capture and display any errors that prevent the application from loading
Test the deployed Version 44 on multiple mobile browsers (Safari, Chrome, Firefox) to identify browser-specific issues that may cause the loading problem

new_feature_requests.summary: Enlarge speaker logo to fill available white space at top of page
Update slogan to 'Giving Everyone A Voice!' with capital G and exclamation mark
Increase the size of the speaker logo/placeholder at the top of the page to fill the available white space, making it significantly larger than its current size
Update the slogan text to 'Giving Everyone A Voice!' with a capital 'G' at the beginning and an exclamation mark at the end
Move dropdown menu (About/Privacy Policy) next to logo in top left, place login button underneath with small spacing
Make header more compact by reducing spacing/padding and moving slogan closer
Add favorite button (heart icon) to each audio upload, accessible only to logged-in members
Add audio reply button to record responses directly to any audio upload, accessible only to logged-in members
Store audio replies as independent uploads linked to the original audio file
Create separate 'Audio Replies' section to display linked responses for each audio upload
Store audio replies as independent audio posts in the backend with a reference link to the original audio post they are replying to
Remove the stationary upload button positioned to the right of the logo (underneath the floating buttons)
Reduce spacing between the logo and slogan to make them more compact
Increase spacing below the slogan to separate it from the search bar
Further reduce overall header spacing and padding to make it even more compact
Move slogan even closer underneath the logo while maintaining separation from search bar
Crop the logo image to remove excess white space underneath, allowing the slogan to sit much closer to the logo
Crop the speaker logo image file to remove excess white space underneath the graphic, allowing the slogan to sit much closer to the logo and creating a more compact header overall
Replace current logo with user's uploaded speaker logo image
Position slogan below the header separator line (not on top of it) while keeping it close to the logo
Replace current logo with new cropped speaker logo (file_000000008744720abc6dc9f1fb80f8e2-8.png) while maintaining current size and positioning
Implement upload persistence system to prevent accidental deletion during site updates or alterations
Create admin role with special permissions accessible only to the site owner for managing all uploads
Restrict upload deletion to original uploader or admin only
Apply favorite and audio reply functionality retroactively to all existing uploads created before these features were implemented

Implement a backend upload persistence system that prevents audio posts from being accidentally deleted during site updates, alterations, or code changes. Audio posts should remain in stable storage and only be removable through explicit delete operations by authorized users.

Create an admin role system in the backend that grants special permissions to delete any audio post. The admin role must be restricted so that only the site owner (specific principal ID) can access admin privileges.

Update the backend audio post deletion logic to restrict deletion permissions: only the original uploader of a post or an admin can delete that post. Regular users cannot delete posts created by other users.

Update the frontend AudioCard component to ensure that all existing audio posts created before the favorite and reply features were implemented now display the favorite button (heart icon), audio reply button, and Audio Replies section with the same functionality as newer posts.

Verify that the backend audio post data model supports favorite and reply functionality for all existing posts, ensuring that posts created before these features were added can be favorited and replied to without data migration issues.
Add content rating toggle to upload interface allowing users to mark audio as 'Kid-Friendly' or 'Adult Content'
Create kid-friendly authentication system using username + PIN code instead of email login
Add 'KIDS' button to main navigation (next to FEED/EXPLORE/UPLOAD) that switches entire site to kids mode
Implement kids mode with filtered feed showing only kid-friendly uploads and playful, colorful styling
Apply same core functionality in kids section (favorites, replies, upload, categories) with kid-friendly content filter
Enforce 1-hour upload limit in kids section
Update the backend AudioPost data model in backend/main.mo to include a 'kidFriendly' boolean field that stores whether the audio content is marked as kid-friendly
Add a backend query function in backend/main.mo that filters and returns only audio posts marked as kid-friendly (kidFriendly = true)
Create a simplified authentication system for kids mode using username and PIN code instead of Internet Identity email login, stored securely in the backend
Verify that the backend canister in backend/main.mo compiles successfully and deploys without errors, ensuring all query functions and mutations are accessible

projectName: Enlarge logo and update slogan formatting
